title: YKHC distributing N-95 masks to YK service area residents
summary: YKHC is partnering with local tribal governments to distribute two, free N-95 masks to every resident in the YKHC service area. The masks, provided by the Indian Health Service (IHS), offer the highest level of protection and have been shown to reduce transmission of the virus that causes COVID-19....

title: Takotna, a Small Town with a Big Iditarod Welcome
summary: Takotna, home to about 65 people most of the year, is a favorite stop among Iditarod participants because of its warm welcome. The post Takotna, a Small Town with a Big Iditarod Welcome appeared first on Alaska Magazine .

title: Celebrating 40 Years of Self-Determination
summary: Celebrating 40 Years of Self-Determination By Southcentral Foundation Public Relations After decades as “beneficiaries” of an inefficient, underfunded federal health care system, Alaska Native and American Indian people were ready for radical changes in their health care experience. title: Sixty new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta March 5-7
summary: On March 5, YKHC reports thirty-two new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta.
